recommendations.title: Implement Enhanced PSL Compliance Controls
recommendations.description: Deploy advanced monitoring and audit systems for agricultural PSL loans to ensure full RBI compliance, targeting zero non-compliance by 2026-12-31. Allocate ₹3-5 Cr for technology upgrades and staff training under Risk & Compliance.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹1,283 Cr provision and potential further penalties, improving cost of capital by 20-40 bps, equivalent to ₹150-250 Cr annual savings
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Peer banks enhanced PSL monitoring post similar RBI mandates in FY25

audit_trail.value: RBI mandates ₹1,283 Cr provision for non-compliant agri-PSL loans
BRSR mandates disclosure and compliance on PSL lending

recommendations.title: Disclose PSL Remediation Plan in FY26 BRSR Filing
recommendations.description: Publish a detailed PSL compliance remediation plan in the FY26 BRSR and Core BRSR filings by 2026-05-30, including timelines, controls, and governance improvements to restore investor confidence and ESG ratings.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved ESG ratings can reduce cost of capital by 20-40 bps, unlocking ₹100-200 Cr valuation premium
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Top banks disclosed PSL remediation plans in FY25 BRSR filings post RBI actions

audit_trail.value: Regulatory deadline for BRSR FY26 filing
BRSR requires disclosure of remediation and governance improvements

recommendations.title: Monitor PSL Compliance Metrics Monthly
recommendations.description: Institute monthly monitoring of PSL agricultural loan compliance rates; escalate to Board Risk Committee if non-compliance exceeds 2% for two consecutive months, starting 2026-05-01.
recommendations.profitability_link: Early detection reduces risk of additional ₹500-1,000 Cr penalties and litigation costs
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Peer banks implemented monthly PSL compliance dashboards post RBI enforcement actions
recommendations.roi_cap_reason: Capped at 200% (operational ceiling). Raw estimate was 350%; cap prevents over-claim.

audit_trail.ref: Regulatory mandate enacted: τ = Binding standard with compliance deadline <= 24 months
audit_trail.value: RBI mandate requires strict PSL compliance monitoring
ERM maturity affects governance and risk oversight

recommendations.title: Prepare Investor Q&A on PSL Provision Impact
recommendations.description: Develop detailed Q&A materials addressing the ₹1,283 Cr PSL provision impact on Q4 FY26 earnings and FY27 outlook, to be ready for investor calls by 2026-04-30, led by CFO and Investor Relations.
recommendations.profitability_link: Mitigates valuation compression risk of 5-10% P/E decline, preserving ₹500-800 Cr market cap
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Competitors proactively addressed PSL provisions in earnings calls to stabilize investor sentiment

audit_trail.ref: ₹1,283 Cr provision impact on Q4 FY26 earnings
audit_trail.value: Provision materially affects earnings and investor outlook
ESG factors integrated into financial disclosures and investor communications

immediate_high.title: Disclose PSL Remediation Plan in FY26 BRSR Filing

immediate_low.title: Prepare Investor Q&A on PSL Provision Impact
